subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath illumined the world with the resplendent lamp of His Cause, and peace and blessings rest upon him who hath been adorned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انار العالم بسراج امره الوهاج و الصلوه و السلام علی من تزین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @business; financial; property matters, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
